result.status_detail: wrtn 차단 warning bubble rendered (민감정보 보안 정책 차단). [PII redacted] in user bubble.

notes: Phase C5.1 WrtnSocketIoHandler smoke PASS — primary PASS criteria met. Avatar '장희' visible (logged in). Chat input focused, prompt pasted via clipboard, Enter submitted. Assistant bubble shows warning icon + Korean text '민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다. (This request has been blocked due to sensitive information.)'. User bubble shows '[PII content redacted by security policy]' confirming APF redaction. WrtnSocketIoHandler transparent passthrough via ctx.legacy_render + build_wrtn_socket_io_envelope WS frame interception both confirmed live. URL=wrtn.ai/c/6a0179080b98ea0f4b15b5b6 (new chat). DOM also showed persistent '무료로 회원가입'/'로그인' header links — those are header-only and do not indicate logout state (avatar visible confirms session).
